overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates past a burning vehicle wreck, through a temporary construction encampment under an overpass, and into an indoor parking garage, with pervasive neon lighting and atmospheric fog throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city intersection with vehicle crash site

events.description: approaching burning vehicle wreck with smoke rising from the crash site
turning right at intersection to navigate around the crash

agents.ego_description: navigating wet city streets while approaching a burning vehicle wreck at an intersection

entered.detail: rain-soaked reflective black asphalt with yellow lane markings
wrecked car engulfed in flames with thick smoke billowing upward
large holographic advertisement with bright pink and blue neon lighting
suspended traffic signal showing green light
tall glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked city street at night, with the vehicle approaching an intersection where a car is burning fiercely. Neon billboards and futuristic architecture line the street as the driver navigates the wet asphalt, turning right to avoid the crash site.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone and temporary encampment under highway overpass

events.description: entering covered construction area beneath concrete overpass
navigating through narrow passage lined with camping tents and construction barriers

agents.ego_description: slowly driving through narrow construction zone with red and white barriers and temporary camping structures

entered.detail: rough concrete underside of highway overpass with exposed beams
plastic construction barriers with alternating red and white stripes
temporary fabric shelters and tarps set up along the roadside
metal scaffolding framework with green safety netting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a sheltered construction zone beneath a massive concrete overpass, where temporary camping tents and scaffolding line the narrow passage. Red and white construction barriers guide the path through this improvised encampment area.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with palm tree median and neon signage

events.description: exiting construction zone back onto open highway with palm trees visible
passing large holographic billboard with bright neon advertisement

agents.ego_description: accelerating along open highway past palm trees and futuristic neon billboards

entered.detail: smooth multi-lane road surface with reflective wet patches
tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway
large floating digital advertisement with cyan and magenta neon colors
low concrete barrier separating lanes with yellow reflective strips

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the construction zone, the vehicle accelerates onto an open highway lined with palm trees and illuminated by neon holographic billboards. The wet road reflects the colorful lights as the car speeds through the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor parking garage with graffiti art and fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering indoor parking garage with sudden shift to artificial fluorescent lighting
passing colorful graffiti mural painted on red concrete wall

agents.ego_description: driving through dimly lit parking garage navigating between concrete pillars

entered.detail: thick structural support columns with rough concrete finish
bright orange metal storage doors with horizontal slats
large colorful street art painting with abstract designs on red wall
long overhead fluorescent tube lights casting greenish glow
exposed concrete ceiling with ventilation ducts and pipes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters an indoor parking garage, transitioning from the neon-lit exterior to fluorescent artificial lighting. The driver navigates between thick concrete pillars, passing orange storage doors and vibrant graffiti murals on the walls as the car descends into the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis that transitions from chaotic city streets into a sterile indoor parking structure. It begins on a wet asphalt road at night, navigating past a fiercely burning car wreck beneath the glow of neon billboards. As the vehicle turns away from the crash, the scene shifts into a sheltered construction zone beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing through a narrow corridor of temporary tents and scaffolding. The environment then opens up onto a wide highway lined with palm trees and holographic displays before the camera turns toward the entrance of a parking garage. Finally, the neon-lit exterior gives way to fluorescent artificial lighting as the car descends past concrete pillars, orange storage doors, and vibrant graffiti murals.
